author: Carlos Garcia
title: Exclusive: Polymarket acquires the startup Brahma, in effort to scale its crypto and DeFi infrastructure

author: Dylan Butts
title: Meta's Manus launches desktop app to bring its AI agent onto personal devices amid OpenClaw craze
description: Manus has announced the launch of a new desktop application to bring its AI agent directly onto personal devices.
content:
Artificial intelligence start-up Manus, recently acquired by Meta, launched a new desktop application Monday that brings its AI agent directly onto personal laptops.
